title: prunus avium var. duracina
intro: Prunus avium var. duracina, also known as wild cherry or sour cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The bark and leaves of Prunus avium var. duracina contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable plant for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Prunus avium var. duracina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including coughs, colds, and gastrointestinal problems.
